headline: Can CRWD Stock Deliver If The AI Boom Stalls?
summary: After a 40% run over the last 12 months, the conversation around CrowdStrike (CRWD) stock is almost entirely about artificial intelligence. You hear about the Mythos inflection point and a new generation of products designed to secure AI deployments. But with that excitement comes a fair question from skeptics: Is this a durable trend, or just a surge of interest and intent from companies still in the early innings of actual AI deployment.

headline: Is Palo Alto Networks, Inc. (PANW) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is PANW a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Palo Alto Networks, Inc. on Value & Momentum Portfolio’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on PANW. Palo Alto Networks, Inc.’s share was trading at $260.52 as of June 9th. PANW’s trailing and forward P/E were 226.54 and 63.69 […]

headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.
